market.advice: Healthy, broad tape into the open — normal position sizing. SPY (748) is back above its 50-day with breadth a solid 63% and a calm VIX (17.6). This is a rotation-led uptrend, not a mega-cap melt-up: the leaderboard is dominated by financials (banks + insurers), REITs, industrials/transports, healthcare and energy, while stretched AI/semis (NVDA, AMD, MU, ORCL still 12-60% off highs) base rather than lead. The headline risk is geopolitical — the U.S.-Iran conflict keeps Strait of Hormuz shipping disrupted and oil twitchy, which is exactly why energy (EOG, OKE) is bid. Play the strength that's actually working: buy un-extended breakouts sitting AT new highs in the leading value/defensive groups, respect stops, and don't chase the handful of names already running hot into RSI 75+.

picks.name: Werner Enterprises, Inc.
picks.thesis: The single cleanest breakout on the board and the top score in the scan — Werner is at fresh 52-week highs on a textbook 4-contraction VCP as freight rates firm and money rotates into transports. TradingView independently rates it STRONG BUY (16 buy / 1 sell), a full technical confirmation.
strengths: Top score 95, VCP + RS line at new highs (0% off high)
Revenue +13.6% as the trucking cycle turns up
risks: Earnings Jul 29 (~7 days out) — real gap risk into the print

picks.name: Federal Realty Investment Trust
picks.thesis: Blue-chip shopping-center REIT and rare Dividend King breaking to new highs as rates ease and income rotation accelerates. RSI 62 leaves room to run and TV agrees with a BUY.
strengths: Score 94.3, VCP at highs, RSI 62 (not extended)
Dividend King durability; EPS +152% off a low base
Leadership group — REITs are leading the tape
risks: REIT bid unwinds if long yields snap back up
watch: Hold above the pivot; volume on the push through highs

picks.name: Kimco Realty Corporation
picks.thesis: Open-air shopping-center REIT sitting right at new highs (-0.1%) with a tight VCP and RSI 62 — the un-extended income breakout this tape rewards. TV confirms BUY (14/3).
strengths: At highs, VCP, RS line at new highs
Rotation into REITs as rates ease

Yutrepia commercial ramp driving explosive revenue growth

picks.name: NVIDIA Corporation
picks.thesis: The AI leader is basing ~12% below its high on a VCP with revenue +85%, and TradingView still rates it STRONG BUY (17/1). But it is NOT at new highs like the day's leaders, so it's a WATCH, not a chase — a reclaim of the pivot with volume flips it to a buy. Note the tension: TV's technicals are very bullish while price action is still repairing.
strengths: TV STRONG BUY (17/1); revenue +85%, cheap on growth (fwd P/E ~16)
VCP forming; still the AI infrastructure leader
RSI 56 — plenty of room if it breaks out
risks: 12% off highs — basing, not leading right now
Rotation is OUT of stretched semis; needs a volume reclaim
Earnings Aug 27 is a binary swing print
watch: Reclaim of the ~$207 pivot on above-average volume
Whether AI/semi rotation turns back on

picks.name: Amazon.com, Inc.
picks.thesis: Mega-cap in a VCP but still ~10% below its high with revenue +17% and earnings Jul 31 — constructive, but a basing name into a big print. WATCH for a breakout confirmation rather than buying ahead of earnings. TV confirms BUY (11/5).
strengths: Score 89.1, VCP, RSI 62; AWS + retail margin story
risks: 10% off highs and earnings Jul 31 — gap risk into a base
watch: Reclaim of the pivot / AWS growth re-acceleration

picks.name: Bank of America Corporation
picks.thesis: High-quality A+ bank breakout at new highs with EPS +36% — but RSI 70.9 is running hot right at the pivot, so it's a WATCH for a pullback-to-support entry rather than a chase. The setup and TV (STRONG BUY territory across banks) are excellent; the timing isn't fresh.
risks: RSI 70.9 — extended, chasing invites a shakeout
watch: A tight pullback that holds the ~$61 pivot

picks.name: EOG Resources, Inc.
picks.thesis: Best-in-class E&P at new highs (-2.8%) on a VCP with a cheap ~10x multiple — a prime beneficiary of the Hormuz oil bid. But RSI 72.9 is hot, so WATCH for a controlled entry rather than chasing the geopolitical spike.
strengths: Energy leadership on Strait-of-Hormuz supply risk
risks: RSI 73 — extended; oil-price-driven moves reverse fast
A Mideast ceasefire could unwind the oil premium quickly
watch: A pullback that holds the ~$143 pivot

picks.name: The Vita Coco Company, Inc.
picks.thesis: High-quality coconut-water grower with revenue +37% and TradingView STRONG BUY (16/0) — but earnings are TOMORROW (Jul 23) and RSI is 72, so it's a WATCH into the print, not a fresh entry. Great business, wrong day to chase.
strengths: TV STRONG BUY (16/0) — strong technical agreement
watch: A clean post-earnings base/breakout to enter

picks.name: Crocs, Inc.
picks.thesis: Strong consumer breakout near highs (-2.6%) but RSI 72 is hot and EPS growth has turned slightly negative — a WATCH into the Jul 30 print rather than a chase. Wait for the base or a post-earnings entry.

EPS growth slightly negative; HeyDude drag
